subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned his face towards the Countenance of God, the Lord of all worlds, and hath traversed the path until [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی توجه الی وجه الله رب العالمین و قطع السبیل الی ان
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
